title: Walk-in Drive Production Engineer at Kia India

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Production Engineer at Kia India
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Production Engineer with drive and ambition, Kia India in Kolkata is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Kia India:
Kia India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in AutoCAD

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kia India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
